info.description: The big banner at the TOP of any Page Builder page. Title + subtitle + image/video + 1-2 buttons. Image (or video) fills the background, text sits on top with a dark overlay so it stays readable.

title.description: BIG HERO HEADLINE — the largest text on the page, top centre. Keep under ~8 words. Example: 'REGULATED.', 'Welcome to The Houseboat.'

subtitle.description: Single italic line BELOW the title. Example: 'A new pay-what-you-feel course.', 'For founders. For mothers. For you.'. Leave blank to hide.

image.description: BACKGROUND IMAGE — fills the entire hero band, behind the text. Landscape orientation works best (16:9, at least 1600×900px). Will be auto-darkened by the overlay so text stays readable.

video.description: OPTIONAL background video — autoplays muted, loops. If both image and video are uploaded, video wins. Keep under 10MB for fast loading.

cta_text.description: PRIMARY BUTTON text (the bigger one, brand colour). Example: 'Join the course', 'Pay what you feel'. Leave blank to hide button.

cta_link.description: Where the primary button goes. Example: '#pricing' (scrolls to a section on the same page), '/the-work/regulated/buy', or a full URL like 'https://buy.stripe.com/...'.

cta_secondary_text.description: SECONDARY BUTTON text (smaller, outlined). Example: 'Read the story', 'Watch the trailer'. Leave blank to show only one button (or zero).

overlay_opacity.description: Darkness of the overlay on top of the background image (0 = no overlay, 100 = fully black). Default 40. Increase if your image is very bright and text is hard to read; decrease if image is dark already.

style.description: Optional advanced styling (background colour if no image, text colour, padding, alignment). Leave blank for sensible defaults.
